meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] 26.03

### Added

- initial version of the aspect models in the material namespace for material accounting

nodes.label: WasteCode
nodes.description: The WasteCode aspect model defines a standardized and interoperable representation of waste categorization information, including European Waste Catalogue (EWC) codes and their descriptions, to classify vehicles, parts or materials in a consistent and machine-readable manner.

nodes.label: wasteCode
nodes.description: The waste code is used to identify the type of waste on part or material level.

nodes.label: WasteCodeEnum
nodes.description: Enumeration of waste codes according to EWC (european waste directory).
